rules_applied: Q1: All *HOEST* (×31 cells) → *KUCH* — Tom directive 2026-04-28: KUCH is de facto standard for Sick's cough (overrides codex's HOEST/KUCH register split).
Q1: Dedupe doubled-asterisk anomaly at E2_World_A1 R29 ('*HOEST HOEST**HOEST HOEST*' → '*KUCH KUCH*' to match EN single set).
Q2: No pronouns in corpus — no flip needed.
Q4: Spoken word at E6_Nightmare R48 ('Omdraaien.' with engine tags) — already correct, no change.
Q5: 3 '...' ellipses (R49, R4, R5) kept as cross-language sfx.
decision_status: Tom directive 2026-04-28: KUCH-standardize all HOEST. 31 cells.
